files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info and get_ts_language
Added tsx extension mapping and supported language entry

compile_belief_reason: All four insertion points mirror the existing typescript arm exactly, using the correct LANGUAGE_TSX constant, typescript:: module prefix for shared queries and handlers, and cfg feature gates. No new pub mod declaration was added since the shared pub mod typescript; already covers lang-tsx via the any() cfg guard at line 26.
